## Schedule {.unnumbered}

**Spring 2026**

## Course schedule

| Week | Date | Topic | Readings / Prep | Due |
|--------------:|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 1 | 2026-04-01 | Introduction + course logistics | Syllabus, Lecture 1 | Activity 1 |
| 1 | 2026-04-03 | R basics and plots | [r4ds](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html) chapter 1, Lecture 2 | Activity 2 |
| 2 | 2026-04-05 | Types of studies | Lecture 3 | Activity 3 |
| 2 | 2026-04-07 | Probability | Lecture 4 | Activity 4 |
| 2 | 2026-04-10 | Probability 2 + Quiz 1 | Lecture 5 | No activity |
| 3 | 2026-04-13 | Probability 3 | Lecture 6 | Activity 5 |
| 3 | 2026-04-15 | Probability 3 | Lecture 6 | Activity 6 |
| 3 | 2026-04-17 | The normal distribution | Lecture 7 + Quiz 2 |  |
| 4 | 2026-04-20 | Central Limit Theorem | Lecture 8 | Activity 7  |
| 4 | 2026-04-22 | Confidence Intervals | Lecture 9 |   |
| 4 | 2026-04-24 | Z-test, t-test | Lecture 10 + Quiz 3 |   |
